messages.author: Andreas_Waldherr
messages.text: Hi MeshCore developers, would it be possible to add a watchdog feature—at least for devices where the hardware supports it? I understand that a watchdog can sometimes mask underlying issues, but it could be especially useful for repeaters, which are often installed in hard-to-reach locations (like rooftops) and are critical for network connectivity. Suggestions: Enable the watchdog only for repeaters by default, since they are most impacted by hangs. Make it configurable (ON/OFF) via the repeater setup menu. This way, we can monitor uptime and detect if the microcontroller has restarted, helping us identify and address problems more easily. It would save everyone from having to climb up and manually reset repeaters from time to time! Thanks for considering this—it would be a huge help for the community. And a merry Christmas to you all! Best regards, Andreas
messages.content_html:
Hi MeshCore developers, would it be possible to add a watchdog feature—at least for devices where the hardware supports it? I understand that a watchdog can sometimes mask underlying issues, but it could be especially useful for repeaters, which are often installed in hard-to-reach locations (like rooftops) and are critical for network connectivity. Suggestions:
  • Enable the watchdog only for repeaters by default, since they are most impacted by hangs.
  • Make it configurable (ON/OFF) via the repeater setup menu. This way, we can monitor uptime and detect if the microcontroller has restarted, helping us identify and address problems more easily. It would save everyone from having to climb up and manually reset repeaters from time to time! Thanks for considering this—it would be a huge help for the community. And a merry Christmas to you all!
Best regards, Andreas
messages.reactions_html: 2

messages.author: recrof
messages.text: I have around 20 nrf52 repeaters and never encoutered firmware freeze of single one of them.. what hardware do you use?
messages.content_html: I have around 20 nrf52 repeaters and never encoutered firmware freeze of single one of them.. what hardware do you use?

messages.author: Andreas_Waldherr
messages.text: Hi recrof, thanks for your answer! I will repost on GitHub... I use a Heltec T114 V2... with a 4000mAh LiPo and an 10W Solarpanel - just for your info.
messages.content_html: Hi recrof, thanks for your answer! I will repost on GitHub... I use a Heltec T114 V2... with a 4000mAh LiPo and an 10W Solarpanel - just for your info.
messages.reply_html:
recrof
btw this forum is not made for issues/feature requests, so core MC devs are not monitoring it regurally. would suggest using GitHub issues for adding feature requests (edited)
